creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Looking at the first entry:

error: entries point to the same inode but have different meta: ./etc/pam.d/ftpd,./etc/pam.d/ftp in line 1997,1998. off by "mode"

This comes from lib/libpam/pam.d/Makefile:

afterinstallconfig:
        ${INSTALL_LINK} ${TAG_ARGS} ${DESTDIR}${CONFDIR}/ftpd ${DESTDIR}${CONFDIR}/ftp

which uses share/mk/bsd.own.mk:

HRDLINK?=       -l h -o ${_LINKOWN} -g ${_LINKGRP} -m ${_LINKMODE}
...
INSTALL_LINK?=          ${INSTALL} ${HRDLINK}

results in METALOG:

./etc/pam.d/ftpd type=file uname=root gname=wheel mode=0644 size=359 tags=package=ftp,config
./etc/pam.d/ftp type=file uname=root gname=wheel mode=0555 size=359 tags=package=runtime

The dwatch ones use e.g. `LINKS+= ${LIBEXECDIR}/dwatch/io ${LIBEXECDIR}/dwatch/io-done` rather than INSTALL_LINK explicitly.

(It looks like I've just found again what Martin reported in comment #4.)
